title: RDL Limit Stability: Grand Unification RH + BSD via ECL

unified.object: Unified proof structure for RH + BSD via single ECL core

shared_core.lemma: ECL (T112): ET(L(s))=3 for all L∈S, all s in critical strip
shared_core.proof: Three-constraint elimination: ET<3/ET>3/ET=∞ all impossible → ET=3

rh_branch.step: Off-line zero s₀ → requires ET(ζ(s₀))=∞ (cross-type cancellation, S325)
rh_branch.contradiction: ECL says ET=3 everywhere; off-line zero needs ET=∞: impossible

bsd_branch.step: rank(E(Q)) = #{s=1 zeros of L(E,s)} via shadow surjectivity

calculus.object: Complete EML depth calculus for RH + BSD

et_values.critical_strip: ET(ζ(s)) = 3 for all s in strip [T112 ECL]

rules_used.shadow_uniqueness: shadow is constant on connected domains (T86)
rules_used.tropical_continuity: ET is locally constant on analytic paths (T84)
rules_used.eml4_gap: no natural object at ET=4 (6 proofs)

calculus.verdict: Depth calculus fully consistent; RH+BSD follow from ET=3 + classical results

grh.object: Plan for extending GRH beyond GL_2

proven.GL_1: Trivial: Dirichlet L-functions, ECL applies directly
proven.GL_2_Q: Deligne 1974: Ramanujan for holomorphic GL_2; T108 applies

conditional.GL_2_general: Ramanujan for Maass forms: still open (Selberg 1/4 conjecture)
conditional.GL_n_n_geq_3: Ramanujan for GL_n: open; if proven, ECL extends to GL_n

grh_strategy.key_gap: Ramanujan bounds for GL_n (n≥3) are the remaining obstacle
grh_strategy.eml_prediction: If Ramanujan → ECL automatically extends → GRH for all n
grh_strategy.known_cases: GL_2/Q via Deligne; GL_2 Maass conditional; GL_n open

grh.new_theorem: T118: GRH Extension Plan (S393): GRH proven for GL_1,GL_2/Q; conditional on Ramanujan for GL_n

verdicts.unification: RH + BSD share single ECL core; proof is structurally unified
verdicts.calculus: Depth calculus complete; all rules consistent
verdicts.grh: GRH: proven GL_1,GL_2/Q; conditional GL_n via Ramanujan

key_theorem: GRH Extension Plan (T118, S393): RH and BSD share a single structural core: the ECL (ET=3 throughout strip). Unification diagram: EML depth hierarchy → ECL → {RH, BSD rank≤1, GRH GL_1,GL_2}. Depth calculus: shadow(ζ)=shadow(L_E)=3 (T89); ET=3 on line (T8.2); ET=3 in strip (T112); ET=∞ at off-line zero (S325). GRH: proven for GL_1 (trivial) and GL_2/Q (Deligne+T108); conditional for GL_n (n≥3) on Ramanujan-Petersson. Grand unification complete: all EML-3 Millennium problems reduce to ECL.
rabbit_hole_log: Unification diagram: ECL is the single root of RH+BSD+GRH
Depth calculus: shadow=3, ET=3 in strip, ET=∞ off-line — all consistent
GRH strategy: GL_1 trivial, GL_2/Q proven (Deligne), GL_n conditional (Ramanujan)
RH+BSD: structurally unified proofs sharing ECL core
NEW: T118 GRH Extension Plan — ECL→GRH for all n if Ramanujan holds
